title: borzicactus sepium subsp. websterianus
intro: Borzicactus sepium subsp. websterianus, also known as Webster's Prickly Pear, is a cactus species native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Borzicactus sepium subsp. websterianus is typically prepared as a tea or juice, which can also be used topically to aid in the healing process.
